structuredOutput.intent: shape ingress context and emit structured ICMA output for a browser-driven multi-step user request

intentChunks.taskSummary: Prepare current executable context for the latest user request: 用浏览器打开 https://example.com ，告诉我页面标题，并截一张页面截图；如果还没完成，就继续调用工具直到真正完成，不要提前停。然后给我开一个tab,打开www.google.com,然后搜索国际实时金价,把现在的金价用刀/盎司给我说明白 :: user_input
intentChunks.operatorGuide: 先保留和当前任务直接相关的约束与目标。
intentChunks.childGuide: 如果要给子任务播种，这一块仍然只能经由 child ICMA 进入子链。

guide.operatorGuide: Preserve high-signal input and emit controlled pre-sections only.
guide.childGuide: Any child seed must enter child ICMA only.

structuredOutput.llmIntentRationale: The user request is explicitly operational and contains a completion constraint ('continue calling tools until truly finished'). It also bundles two distinct browser tasks, so it should be split into two intent chunks while preserving the original constraint fragment type only.

reviewOutput.reviewRefAnnotation: Stable review ref retained for checker handoff: refs/cmp/review/1 maps to commitRef cmp-cli-commit-1 for delta cmp-cli-delta-1; no source sections were provided, so this iteration advances the prepared candidate as the minimum auditable review unit.
reviewOutput.commitRationale: The minimum review unit is the commit, and the provided context already supplies a commitRef. With no source section IDs to gate on, there is no basis to hold progression; the stable review ref is preserved for downstream checking.

checker.latestUserMessage: 用浏览器打开 https://example.com ，告诉我页面标题，并截一张页面截图；如果还没完成，就继续调用工具直到真正完成，不要提前停。然后给我开一个tab,打开www.google.com,然后搜索国际实时金价,把现在的金价用刀/盎司给我说明白

splitExecutions.rationale: split candidate sections into executable checked targets

reviewOutput.trimSummary: No source evidence or checked sections were provided, so there was nothing to trim, split, or merge.
reviewOutput.shortReason: No evidence to restructure; no promote requested.
reviewOutput.detailedReason: The input contains no source sections and no checked sections, so there is no candidate evidence to reframe into a higher-signal review. This response keeps checked state separate from any suggest-promote flow and does not alter parent review decisions. Because suggestPromote is false, no promote signal is emitted.
reviewOutput.promoteRationale: Not promoted: suggestPromote=false and there is no review evidence to justify escalation beyond the checked snapshot.

materializationRationale.summary: Materialize a differentiated DB-backed package family so the checked truth is represented as a canonical primary package, historical evolution is preserved in a timeline package, task-level checked states are emitted as task snapshots, and passive historical replies remain replayable at high fidelity.

decisions.decision: Use the checked snapshot as the authoritative source for a single explicit primary package bound to the active package ref.
decisions.why: This gives one canonical package for current truth and avoids conflating current state with timeline or task history.

decisions.decision: Persist a separate secondary timeline package linked to the same package family.
decisions.why: This isolates chronological review and promote history from the active primary package while supporting parent-side review flows and promote request auditing.

decisions.decision: Emit one task snapshot record per checked context, even when sourceSectionIds is empty.
decisions.why: Task snapshots provide stable, queryable checkpoints for downstream replay, inspection, and incremental rematerialization.

decisions.decision: Store passive reply history as historical payloads associated with timeline/task records rather than collapsing them into the active primary package.
decisions.why: This preserves high-fidelity passive responses for historical serving without polluting the active package surface.

decisions.decision: Record promote-review entries on the parent side of the timeline/review chain.
decisions.why: Parent-side review ownership keeps promotion decisions auditable and makes approval lineage explicit.

resultingFamilyShape.primaryPackage: current checked truth for active use
resultingFamilyShape.taskSnapshots: checked-context snapshots for task-scoped restoration and analysis
